name: WildLink
tagline: Offline mesh tracking for the Canadian Rockies
description: LoRa-based mesh tracking device and platform for hikers and families in the Canadian Rockies. Works without cell coverage or monthly fees — real-time group location sharing over a proprietary radio mesh network. The project spans hardware (custom PCB, embedded firmware) and software (consumer landing page + admin CRM dashboard).
features: Custom PCB design & embedded LoRa firmware
Mesh network — no cell service or internet required
Real-time map tracking with Angular CRM dashboard
currentWork: Optimizing LoRa packet routing and expanding mesh range for multi-device groups

name: SoloBook
tagline: T2125 bookkeeping SaaS for Canadian freelancers
description: Expense tracking and invoicing platform built specifically for Canadian self-employed contractors. Automatically categorizes expenses by CRA T2125 fields, generates professional invoices, and produces tax-ready annual reports — removing the guesswork from sole-proprietor tax filing.
features: Multilingual interface: EN · FR · UK · RU
currentWork: Building the invoice module with PDF export and automated payment reminders
